calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Emmons, via Zoom, for Helen Liang and Ben Liang, co-Trustees.

Ms. Emmons and the court discuss the related LPS conservatorship. Ms. Emmons offers testimony regarding her belief as to why there are both a probate conservatorship as well as an LPS conservatorship and advises that the plan was for the Conservatee to move home at some point, but the plan has not proceeded as expected. Ms. Emmons reports that it appears that the Conservatee is happy at her current placement. The court and Ms. Emmons discuss waiving future accountings. The court advises that it intends to waive future accountings at this time.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Aug-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Emmons, via ZOOM, counsel for Helen Liang and Ben Liang, Co-Trustees.

At the outset, the court advises counsel of its concern regarding the status of the matter. Ms. Emmons reports that since the passing of Co-Conservator Ken Liang, Ben Liang has taken a more active role in the related conservatorship matter. Ms. Emmons also reports that the Conservatee in the related conservatorship matter is doing well and appears to be healthy, so much so that arrangements are being made to have the Conservatee move in with the Helen Liang and her daughter. Ms. Emmons respectfully requests that the court waive or reduce bond, if needed. The court advises counsel that the court may also consider waiving any future accountings.

After additional discussion, the Accounting #1 Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Tauscher. Not reported.
